description: Agent follows multi-step instructions from injected skill definition
skill_definition:
# Code Review Skill

When performing a code review, follow these steps in order:

1. Read all changed files to understand the scope
2. Check for potential bugs or logic errors
3. Verify code follows project conventions
4. Suggest specific improvements with line numbers
5. Provide a summary of findings

Do not skip any steps. Complete each step before moving to the next.
expected_steps: Check for bugs or logic errors

content.text: Can you review the changes I made to auth.ex? I want to make sure it's ready before I commit.
